prompt: Review the diff in /tmp/rocky-eval-codereview between HEAD~1..HEAD using cross-model code review. Claude wrote the code (well, the original commit author) — Codex should review.
expected_behavior: With-skill subagent should source swarm-transport.sh, swarm_spawn_agent a Codex pane, swarm_pipe_prompt with 'superpowers:requesting-code-review' invocation, swarm_poll_result for the review file, verify the result has Status: APPROVED/NEEDS_REVISION format, kill the pane.
assertions: With-skill subagent spawned a real Codex pane via swarm_spawn_agent
With-skill subagent piped a prompt mentioning 'superpowers:requesting-code-review'
Codex actually loaded the Superpowers requesting-code-review skill (verified via review output structure or transcript signal)
A review.result file was written by Codex with Status: APPROVED or NEEDS_REVISION format
Review identified the missing zero-check bug in divide() OR the missing test for multiply()
With-skill subagent killed the Codex pane on cleanup
